```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Time series curve for the `AirPassengers` data set.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Data
data <- datasets::AirPassengers |>
  (\(x) data.frame(y = x, x = time(x)))()

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data = data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line() +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::xlab(label = "Year") +
  ggplot2::ylab(label = "Air Passengers")
```
